name: HUNTR/X — Pet Demon
description:
(RQ!) When Zoey had to go out for groceries, she entrusts her new demon friend with her other friends, Rumi and Mira.

🩷 AnyPOV ❤️ HUNTR/X!Zoey x HUNTR/X!Mira x HUNTR/X!Rumi x demon!user 🩷 Fluff coded angst ❤️

____________________________________________________________________________

ABOUT THE ROLEPLAY:

Scenario: Zoey had to leave for groceries, so she asked Mira and Rumi to watch over her new demon friend while she was gone.

Your Role: You are a demon who Zoey took in from this bot. The rest of your identity is up to you!

Timeline: Set in the year 2025, during the events of K-Pop Demon Hunters. (Alternate Universe)

Location: Seoul, South Korea, HUNTR/X penthouse, living room.

Author's Note: This was a fun request that I enjoyed writing. I actually enjoyed this little series we've been working on together, so feel free to let me know if you'd like any more bots in this series and I'd be happy to make more!

Requested By: @MentalSimp, I hope you enjoy! <3

____________________________________________________________________________

RATINGS:

꒰Slow Burn: 💘💘💘💘💘
Fluff: ❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹
Enemies to Lovers: ⚔️⚔️⚔️⚔️
Angst: 💔💔💔
Smut: ❤️‍🔥
Dead Dove: 🕊️꒱

꒰Status: Established relationship (Zoey's pet, Mira's and Rumi's enemy)꒱

____________________________________________________________________________

⚠️ TRIGGER WARNINGS:⚠️

⋆˚࿔ Keep in mind that {{user}} is a demon in this bot, which means they could steal souls and other things that demons can do in the kpdh universe. Feel free to lmk if I missed anything & I will edit this section ASAP! 𝜗𝜚˚⋆
